trigger.reason: Monthly overlap had inadequate support and Wilson95 lower bounds; intraday source-window slots lacked long historical yfinance overlap.

objective_restated: Every active MainRegimeV2 regime must reach at least 95% calibrated held-out confidence and survive other-market, other-timeframe, full-cycle, full-species validation. Source labels, scoped factor maps, and coverage panels are inputs only.

acquisition_priorities.required_scope: Enough chronological rows per root/context for calibration support >= 60 and test support >= 60 after split.
acceptable_sources: Independent dated label panel from provider or research source
Owner-approved adjudicated label windows with explicit source_id and crosswalk
Manual/official market-regime annotations mapped to exact provider/instrument/timeframe
forbidden_sources: HMM/GMM state ids without source relabeling and held-out calibration
OHLCV-only proxy labels treated as independent source labels
acquisition_priorities.why: The 124107 run accepted 0 Bull/Bear/Crisis crosswalk slots after calibration.

acquisition_priorities.target: Historical bar overlap for approved source-window labels
acquisition_priorities.required_scope: ^GSPC/SPY/ES=F historical monthly and, if feasible, intraday bars spanning 2000-2024 source windows.
acceptable_sources: Existing local cache with full source-window span
Provider export from IBKR, TradingView, yfinance, or licensed archive with timestamps
Compact derived support counts committed to repo, raw bars kept outside repo
forbidden_sources: Recent-only intraday cache used as proof of historical windows
acquisition_priorities.why: Current intraday/monthly overlap is too sparse for Bear/Crisis and weak for Bull test split.

acquisition_priorities.target: Sideways dated windows beyond scoped Yahoo 1d/1w
acquisition_priorities.required_scope: Intraday/monthly and broader-market Sideways windows with explicit horizon and overlap policy.
acceptable_sources: Owner-approved Sideways adjudication protocol with source seed and chronological validation
Existing accepted Sideways gate expanded only if it preserves held-out Wilson95 >= 0.95
forbidden_sources: Unlabeled range statistic promoted as source
Single-symbol short window with no other-market validation
acquisition_priorities.why: The 123500 Sideways windows are accepted only in scoped Yahoo 1d/1w context.

acquisition_priorities.target: Direct Manipulation positive/negative rows across varieties
acquisition_priorities.required_scope: Replayable event/order-flow/order-lifecycle/on-chain/social rows with matched negatives and source URL/id.
acceptable_sources: Spoofing/layering/quote-stuffing datasets with timestamped positives and same-venue negatives
Order-lifecycle wash/self-trade event rows with matched controls
Official enforcement/case event windows only if mapped to exact asset/venue/time and paired with controls
forbidden_sources: Methodology papers without public row export
Synthetic rows without real event provenance
acquisition_priorities.why: Existing direct evidence is scoped social/event, self-trade/order-lifecycle, and wash-maker; broader direct variety coverage remains partial.

expected_next_loop.name: acquire_or_attach_v4_exact_labels_then_calibrate
expected_next_loop.success_condition: At least one blocked root/context gains enough exact labels and bar overlap to run chronological calibration/test with Wilson95 >= 0.95.
expected_next_loop.abstain_condition: If labels or support remain missing, write explicit abstain per cell instead of reusing source-window projections.
